# SDL Linux Deps Vendoring

Source: https://github.com/castholm/SDL_linux_deps.git
Revision: fd349940b9dbaa0f221703b05df826d745d7ce2a
Zig package hash: sdl_linux_deps-0.0.0-SDL_ltg8hgAOayMwFN6BhHW3Rs5UPtf6n8m-2qcQHuGS

friendly-engine vendors this package because the vendored SDL3 Zig package
uses it as a lazy dependency for Linux targets.

To refresh this tree, use the `vendor-sdl3` contributor skill in
`.agents/skills/vendor-sdl3`.
